form.formComment: Claiming his maiden victory on debut; won by a nose at Eagle Farm 2yo Hcp March 21 over 1000m in soft going defeating On The Clock carrying 57.5kg at $16. Showed plenty of ticker that day and looks very tough to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Claiming his maiden victory on debut; won by a nose at Eagle Farm 2yo Hcp March 21 over 1000m in soft going defeating On The Clock carrying 57.5kg at $16. Showed plenty of ticker that day and looks very tough to beat again.

form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut won by 1.5 len at Gold Coast 2yo Mdn-Sw December 13 over 1200m defeating Monarchal carrying 58kg at $2.05. Went for a spell before racing on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at Eagle Farm 2yo Hcp on March 21 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Unloading with 58.5kg at $6.50. Back in fine order and with a better gate than most key rivals he looks the goods.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Second-up. Promising on debut won by 1.5 len at Gold Coast 2yo Mdn-Sw December 13 over 1200m defeating Monarchal carrying 58kg at $2.05. Back in fine order and with a better gate than most key rivals he looks the goods.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Gelding by Hellbent making his first appearance. Won a Gold Coast trial over 1000m on March 27. Should get all the favours from this good gate and is one to monitor for market support.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Hellbent making his first appearance. Won a Gold Coast trial over 1000m on March 27. Should get all the favours from this good gate and is one to monitor for market support.

form.formComment: First starter by Pierata out of Mightier. Finished second in a trial at Sunshine Coast Inner Track November 11. Tough assignment.

form.formComment: Pat Webster trained two-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Scored in a recent Warwick trial. Watch for any market moves.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Pat Webster trained two-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Scored in a recent Warwick trial. Watch for any market moves.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At debut, 4th of 7 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 800m, 2.75 len behind Lonesome Star carrying 56kg at $9. Unlikely to bother these.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming after a 12 weeks break. Finished off last preparation eighth of 13 at Gold Coast in the LR Mm 2yo Classic January 17 over 1200m, 6 len behind Unit Five carrying 55kg at $201. On debut third of 7 at this track 2yo SWP October 25 over 1050m, 3 len behind Remembrall carrying 55kg at $21. Doubt she can win but worth an each-way ticket.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). Dual acceptor. Resuming after a 12 weeks break. Finished off last preparation eighth of 13 at Gold Coast in the LR Mm 2yo Classic January 17 over 1200m, 6 len behind Unit Five carrying 55kg at $201. On debut third of 7 at this track 2yo SWP October 25 over 1050m, 3 len behind Remembrall carrying 55kg at $21. Doubt she can win but worth an each-way ticket.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping and lost ground.
Raced greenly in the early stages.
Slow to begin. Laid in under pressure over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Last start 4th of 8 at Eagle Farm 2yo Hcp on March 21 over 1000m, slow going 2.5 len behind Unloading carrying 55kg at $17. The race before that sat behind the speed prior to fading 9th of 14 at Gold Coast Qtis Jewel 2yo on March 14 over 1200m, slow going 5 len behind Swift Dragon with 55kg at $101. Getting better with racing and is one of the leading chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Last start 4th of 8 at Eagle Farm 2yo Hcp on March 21 over 1000m, slow going 2.5 len behind Unloading carrying 55kg at $17. Getting better with racing and is one of the leading chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 200m, shifted out, bumping Phere The Warrego.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at Eagle Farm in the G3 Bj Mclachlan December 27 over 1200m, soft track; 5 len behind Zip Lock with 55kg at $15. On debut fourth of 8 at Gold Coast Debut 2yo SW December 19 over 1000m, 1.4 len behind Lumbini carrying 55kg at $31. One for the wider exotics.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Racing first-up today. On debut fourth of 8 at Gold Coast Debut 2yo SW December 19 over 1000m, 1.4 len behind Lumbini carrying 55kg at $31. One for the wider exotics.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out approaching and rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign second of 7 at Toowoomba 2yo Mdn-Sw December 6 over 1000m, a neck behind Tosen Sabi carrying 54kg at $1.26. On debut second of 11 at Sunshine Coast 2yo Hcp November 22 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Scartoon with 57kg at $14. Promising filly who is capable of a top four finish.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 10 at this track in the LR Phelan Ready on December 6 over 1110m, 5 len behind Itchintogo with 55kg at $21. Wait and see what she does today.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. On debut. Two-year-old filly by Jonker out of Pierella. At the most recent trial finished sixth on March 17 at Doomben over 840m. Hard to tip her with any confidence.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. On debut. Two-year-old filly by Jonker out of Pierella. At the most recent trial finished sixth on March 17 at Doomben over 840m. Hard to tip her with any confidence.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at Ipswich 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Duke Of Albemarle with 56kg at $5. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at Sunshine Coast 2yo Hcp on November 22 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Scartoon with 56.5kg at $6. In the mix down in the weights from a good draw.
